title: The Keys to Robin’s Rescue
main_description: The Straw Hats fight CP9 agents for the keys that can unlock Robin’s cuffs. The chapter mainly follows CP9, Spandam, Nami, keeping the focus on the Enies Lobby Climax storyline.
key_events: The Keys to Robin’s Rescue: Rising Conflict
The Keys to Robin’s Rescue: Key Exchange
The Keys to Robin’s Rescue: Turning Point
